name: autocaliweb
tagline: A meal planning application for organizing recipes and grocery lists
description: Autocaliweb is a self-hosted meal planning and grocery list web application that helps users plan recipes, schedule meals, and automate shopping lists.

features.title: Event Scheduling
features.description: Schedule events by collecting participant availability online

features.title: Availability Matching
features.description: Automatically find time slots suitable for all participants

features.title: Calendar Integration
features.description: Sync events with external calendar services

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: Create and manage schedules through a browser

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the scheduling service on your own servers
